questions.question: Describe the difference between 'fork' and 'vfork' system calls in UNIX. Provide an example of when you might use each.
questions.hint: Explain the differences in the parent and child processes

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'popen' function in UNIX, and when might you use it instead of creating a pipe?
questions.hint: Consider the differences in command execution and input/output

questions.question: Compare and contrast System V IPC (Inter-Process Communication) with Message Queues. When might you use one over the other?
questions.hint: Discuss the types of messages, synchronization, and error handling
